Air Armor Tech increases the health of a.message: Air Armour Tech increases the health of all air units by 50%

An eccentric even among Foundation stand.message: An eccentric even among Foundation standards, Blaz has taken to adorning her chassis with various trophies from felled enemies in the form of weaponry, circuitry, and armour chunks. She does so to emulate the various warlords depicted in unearthed progenitor records.

Bot Armor Tech increases health of all b.message: Bot Armour Tech increases health of all bots by 50%

Commander Armor Tech increases the healt.message: Commander Armour Tech increases the health of your commanders by 100%.

Governed entirely by aesthetic concerns,.message: Governed entirely by aesthetic concerns, Wultok has amassed an unwieldy but beautiful array of salvaged armour that somehow still leaves many of his most vulnerable areas open to attack. When questioned about the wisdom of this practice, Wultok declares that one must suffer for fashion. He tisks audibly when faced with an ugly adversary.

Imperator Invictus guards superior armor.message: Imperator Invictus guards superior armour blueprints on Agoge

Many commanders in the Legion considered.message: Many commanders in the Legion considered Bassus inefficient at best and defective at worst for his insistence on outfitting himself with armour five times thicker than other commanders at the cost of mobility. Their opinion changed when Bassus was recovered while drifting through space--the sole survivor of a pivotal battle that ended in a moon colliding with his base.

[strong]Bots:[/strong] Quick and lightly.message: [strong]Bots:[/strong] Quick and lightly armoured units that tend to be used for multiple purposes.
